source_string: Resource Pack introducing several missing languages to Bedrock Edition. Developed by Azurite
translation: Este resource pack ta presenta maga lenguaje que no hay pa na Edicion de Bedrock. Creacion de Azurite

context: Name of the to be translated language

translation: Tan sign in na X box live
Pichi o man hold %s para man Emote

context: Status will be checked or unchecked
TTS spoken word for image types
%s will be replaced with the title of the screen (Example: Library Screen)

translation: Libro de receta y vista de inventario

context: This is numbering, which number out of the total number of objects is available for interaction. Example: 1 of 3
Used for on-screen gamepad helpers (eg. "Y Button : Change User")

translation: El na screen, Configuracion de Chat

El na dialogo, Codigo de Entrada

context: Single quotes (') are there for emphasis on the sound of the letters that will be spoken.
Single quotes (') are there for emphasis on the sound of the letters that will be spoken.

translation: Somete Link del Comentario na Website

context: Pronunciation for a period inside of a URL, as in "www dot microsoft dot com"
This is the name of the popup that appears when a player gets a notification for a game invite or achievement unlocked
This is the name of the popup that appears when a player is shown a game tip

source_string: On your device, screen reader support is enabled by default.
translation: Na tu device, abierto por predeterminao el compatibilidad de leidor de screen.

source_string: We've detected that your system has a screen reader enabled and have automatically enabled Minecraft's screen reader.
translation: Ya detecta kame que ya abri con el leidor de screen el de tuyo system y ya abri con el leidor de screen de Minecraft automaticamente.

source_string: Touch and drag to find controls on the screen, and double tap controls to select. To scroll on a screen, double tap and hold while swiping up or down.
translation: Pichi y man drag para encontra maga control na screebn, y pichi dos veces con el maga control para selecciona. Para man scroll na screen, pichi dos veces y man hold mientras ta'n swipe pa'arriba o pa'abajo.

source_string: We've detected that your account has "Let games read to me" enabled and have automatically enabled Minecraft's screen reader.
translation: Ya detecta kame que abierto el "Let games read to me" na de tuyo account y ya abri con el leidor de screen de Minecraft automaticamente.

source_string: Would you like to turn this off?
translation: Quiere ba tu con este apaga?
El na screen, Entra na Realm
Selecciona input que hace conecta na %s

context: Used for both Xbox and controller on Windows
Used for both Xbox and controller on Windows
left square bracket means '[' on the english keyboard
right square bracket means ']' on the english keyboard

source_string: No emote assigned to this button, press %s the Change Emotes button
translation: No hay emote que asignao na este boton, pichi %s el boton Cambia Emote

source_string: Press right or left to cycle through emote buttons. Press the down arrow to access the Change Emotes button.
translation: Pichi derecha y izquierda para cicla na boton de emote. Pichi el down arrow para man access con el boton Cambia Emote.

source_string: Do you want to sign out and switch accounts?
translation: Quiere ba tu man sign out y cambia na otro account?

source_string: Do you want to switch accounts? Your current account will stay signed in.
translation: Quiere ba tu cambia na otro account? Esta signed in el actual account de tuyo.

source_string: We were unable to sign you out at this time. Please try again later. This will not prevent you from signing in with another account.
translation: Hende kame contigo puede hace sign in ahora. Favor proba otra vez. Hende este contigo preveni man sign in na otro account.

source_string: Power a furnace with a kelp block
translation: Hace dukut un fogon usando con un bloque de quelpo

source_string: Relieve a Blaze of its rod
translation: Alivia con un Incendio el de este barra

source_string: Build some bookshelves to improve your enchantment table
translation: Planta maga estante de libro para hace pa mas fuerte con el mesa de encantamiento de tuyo
Dale come trigo na dos vaca para queda manada

source_string: Construct a furnace out of eight stone blocks
translation: Hace un fogon hecho de ocho bloque de piedra

source_string: Use planks and sticks to make a hoe
translation: Usa maga tabla y garrote para puede hace un azada

source_string: Use planks and sticks to make a pickaxe
translation: Usa maga tabla y garrote para puede hace un pico

source_string: Use planks and sticks to make a sword
translation: Usa maga tabla y garrote para puede hace un espada

source_string: Craft a workbench with four blocks of planks
translation: Crea un mesa de creada usando cuatro bloque de tabla

source_string: Acquire diamonds with your iron tools
translation: Saca diamante usando el de tu maga herramienta de hierro
Dale diamante para na otro jugador.

source_string: Use a book, obsidian and diamonds to construct an enchantment table
translation: Usa libro, obsidiano, y diamante para construi un mesa de encantada

source_string: Fly a pig off a cliff
translation: Manda con el puerco vola estaba na pangpang

source_string: Destroy a Ghast with a fireball
translation: Destroza un Ghast usando de este bola de fuego

source_string: Attack a tree until a block of wood pops out
translation: Bombea que bombea con un pono hasta tiene sale bloque de palo

source_string: Travel by minecart at least 1 km from where you started
translation: Viaja na caritela que hende abaja na 1 kilometro desde donde tu ya principia
Pichi '%1$s' para abri de tuyo inventario.

source_string: Deal nine hearts of damage in a single hit
translation: Dale nueve corazon de damage na cada uno golpeada
Necesita Pa Kita Anda Mas Hondo

source_string: Build a portal to the Nether
translation: Planta un portal para na Nether

source_string: Kill a skeleton with an arrow from more than 50 meters
translation: Mata Calavera usando pana mas de 50 metro de lejos

source_string: Tap jump to exit the boat
translation: Pichi brinca para sale na barco

source_string: Tap jump to exit the minecart
translation: Pichi brinca para sale na caritela

source_string: Tap dismount to exit the minecart
translation: Pichi abaja para sale na caritela
@p = el mas cercano jugador na todo

source_string: Must be an opped player in creative mode
translation: Debe tiene permision de operador el jugador na modo creative

source_string: Command blocks are not enabled on this server
translation: Hende abierto el bloque de comando na este server
Establece Comando de Consola para na Bloque

source_string: Command Input exceeds 500 characters. It is not possible to open the keyboard input on this device type.
translation: Ya sobrepasa el Entrada de Comando de 500 caracter. Hende posible para abri con el entrada de teclado na este clase de device.
Hace Asegura Hende Perde El De Tuyo Maga Mundo!

source_string: Your worlds are not getting saved properly. They might not be here next time you play Minecraft. Go to your Apple TV settings and turn on iCloud to make sure all of your worlds get saved.
translation: Hende salvao enbuenamente el de tuyo maga mundo. Puede que no hay mas ya estos na siguiente tiempo que juga tu Minecraft. Anda na de tuyo configuracion de Apple TV y abri iCloud para hace asegura que salvao el de tuyo maga mundo.

source_string: You do not have enough iCloud space free to save your worlds properly. They might not be here next time you play Minecraft. Free up space on your iCloud account to make sure all of your worlds get saved.
translation: No hay mas tu bastante espacio para na iCloud para embuenamente hace salva con el de tuyo maga mundo. Puede que no hay mas ya estos na siguiente tiempo que juga tu Minecraft. Man vacante espacio na de tuyo iCloud account para hace asegura que salvao el maga mundo de tuyo.

source_string: You need an internet connection to save your worlds properly. They might not be here next time you play Minecraft. Reconnect to the internet to make sure all of your worlds get saved.
translation: Necesita tu conexion de internet para enbuenamente hace salva con el de tuyo maga mundo. Puede que no hay mas ya estos na siguiente tiempo que juga tu Minecraft. Reconecta na internet para hace asegura que salvao el de tuyo maga mundo.

source_string: You need to be signed in to iCloud to play Minecraft. Go to your Apple TV settings and turn on iCloud.
translation: Necesita tu queda signed in na iCloud para juga Minecraft. Anda na de tuyo configuracion de Apple TV y abri iCloud.

source_string: A new iCloud account has signed in. You will need to restart Minecraft to play.
translation: Tiene nuevo iCloud accoune el ya hace sign in. Necesita tu hace restart el Minecraft para juga.

source_string: Minecraft wants to access your local network. This allows you and others on your local network to play together. Declining this permission does not affect online features or gameplay. But will prevent you and others, on the same network, from playing together.
translation: Quiere man access el Minecraft con el de tuyo local network. Permiti este contigo y con el otro jugadores que juga junto-junto na de tuyo local network. Hende este afecta na online features o na juego el declinada de este permiso. Pero preveni este contigo y con el otro juga junto-junto na semejante network.

source_string: To view attributions, please visit https://minecraft.net/attribution in any web browser.
translation: Para mira maga atribucion, favor visita na https://minecraft.net/attribution na masquin cosa browser.
Ta hace empeza con el demo experience...

source_string: We're sorry, but this lesson is not currently available.
translation: Dispensa kanamon, pero no hay pa este leccion sale.
No Hay Pa El Leccion Sale

source_string: Sign in with your school or organizational account to use Minecraft Education.
translation: Man sign usando el de tuyo account de escuela o account organizacional para usa Minecraft Education.

source_string: This account is not eligible to use Minecraft Education.
translation: Hende eligible este account para usa Minecraft Education.

source_string: Sign in with a different account
translation: Man sign in usando un otro account

source_string: This is your final trial of Minecraft Education.%1%1After this session, your school or organization will need to purchase a license for you to continue to use all the features of Minecraft Education.
translation: Este ya de tuyo ultimo trial de Minecraft Education,%1%1Despues de este sesion, necesita compra licencia para contigo el escuela o organizacion de tuyo para puede tu continua usa todo'l funcionalidades de Minecraft Education.

source_string: You have 1 trial of Minecraft Education remaining before your school or organization will need to purchase a license.%1%1Every time you open Minecraft Education, you will use one trial.
translation: Tiene ya lang tu 1 trial de Minecraft Education. Despues, necesita ya compra contigo licencia el de tuyo escuela o organizacion.%1%1Cada vez tu abri Minecraft Educacion, el usa tu un trial.

source_string: Welcome!%1%1You have %2 trials of Minecraft Education available before your school or organization will need to purchase a license.%1%1Every time you open Minecraft Education, you will use one trial. Enjoy!
translation: Bienvenidos!%1Tiene ya lang tu %2 trial de Minecraft Education. Despues, necesita ya compra contigo licencia el de tuyo escuela o organizacion.%1%1Cada vez tu abri Minecraft Educacion, el usa tu un trial. Ojala que gusta tu!

source_string: You have %2 trials of Minecraft Education remaining before your school or organization will need to purchase a license.%1%1Every time you open Minecraft Education, you will use one trial.
translation: Tiene ya lang tu %2 trial de Minecraft Education. Despues, necesita ya compra contigo licencia el de tuyo escuela o organizacion.%1%1Cada vez tu abri Minecraft Educacion, el usa tu un trial.

source_string: Your trial of Minecraft Education is complete.%1%1Your school or organization will need to purchase a license for you to continue to use all of the features of Minecraft Education.%1%1You'll be signed out of your %2 account now and you can explore our feature-limited demo lesson.
translation: Ya acaba ya el de tuyo trial de Minecraft Education.%1%1Necesita ya compra contigo licencia el de tuyo escuela o organizacion para continua usa todo'l funcionalidades de Minecraft Education.%1%1El hace contigo sign out na de tuyo %2 account ahora y puede tu explora con el de amon limitao leccion na demo.

context: Translations should be 20 characters or less

source_string: We can't connect to the service you need right now. Please check your internet connection and try again.
translation: No puede kame conecta na servicio que necesita tu ahora. Favor chequea con el de tuyo conexion de internet y proba otra vez.

source_string: Another device has logged in using your account.
translation: Tiene otro device el ya man log in usando el de tuyo account.

source_string: If you are not an education user, go to the app store to download the standard version.
translation: Si hende tu usuario de education, anda na app store y man download el version estandar.

source_string: Sign In with a Different Account
translation: Man Sign in usando un otro account

source_string: Your trial of Minecraft Education is complete. To continue playing Minecraft Education, you will need to purchase a license.
translation: Ya acaba ya el de tuyo trial na Minecraft Education. Para continua juga Minecraft Education, necesita tu compra un licencia.

source_string: Sorry, we were unable to complete your purchase. Maybe check your internet connection?
translation: Paciencia, pero no puede kame hace completa con el compra de tuyo. Seguro chequea anay tu el de tuyo conexion de internet?

context: All movement that you do with a joystick/WASD on keyboard.
Movement from pushing joystick forward (or pressing W on keyboard)

source_string: The Shield will block incoming damage. The Shield can be equipped in the offhand slot as well as the hotbar. Press and hold :_input_key.sneak: to block with the Shield.
translation: El Escudo ay bloquea masquin cosa damage que viene. Ta puede tambien vesti na offhand slot pati tambien na hotbar. Pichi y man hold :_input_key.sneak: para bloquea usando el Escudo.

source_string: Press :_input_key.chat: to open Chat. Type your message and press ENTER.
translation: Pichi :_input_key.chat: para abri Chat. Man type de tuyo mensaje y pichi ENTER.

source_string: To craft a tool, open up your §ecrafting table§f:crafting_table: by walking up to it and right-clicking it. You can craft a basic version of most tools using two sticks and a few planks - your §erecipe book§f will tell you how!
translation: Para crea un herramienta, abri con el §emesa de creada§f:crafting_table: por medio de anda con este cerca y man right click con este. Puede tu crea simple version del mayoria del maga herramientas usando garrote y un poco de tabla - el de tuyo §elibro de receta§f el guia contigo si paquilaya!

source_string: To fly when in Creative Mode, press :_input_key.jump: twice quickly. To exit flying, repeat the action. To fly faster, push :_input_key.forward: twice in rapid succession or press :_input_key.sprint: while flying. When in flying mode, you can hold down :_input_key.jump: to move up and :_input_key.sneak: to move down.
translation: Para vola na Modo Creative, pichi de paspas el :_input_key.jump: dos veces. Si no quiere ya tu vola, repiti lang con el accion. Para vola paspas, man push :_input_key.forward: dos veces en succesion rapido o pichi :_input_key.sprint: mientras ta vola. Si ta vola, puede tu man hold down :_input_key.jump: para move arriba y :_input_key.sneak: para move abajo.
Bloque Mediao de Ladrillo de Adobe
Bloque Mediao Doble de Ladrillo de Adobe

context: Single quotes (') are there for emphasis on the sound of the letters that will be spoken.
Single quotes (') are there for emphasis on the sound of the letters that will be spoken.

source_string: You can only sleep at night and during thunderstorms
translation: De noche y durante mal tiempo con trueno lang tu puede dormi

source_string: You may not rest now, there are monsters nearby
translation: No puede tu descansa ahora, tiene burujo cerca

source_string: Your home bed was missing or obstructed
translation: Ta esta perdido o sanggao el de tuyo cama de casa
Bloque Mediao Doble de Ladrillo de Adobe
Libro de receta y vista de inventario
